listings.title: Dell UltraSharp U2518D 25-inch Monitor
listings.body: Selling my Dell UltraSharp U2518D 25-inch monitor. No scratches but has a vertical set of discolored lines running through the middle of the screen. Not sure why or how to fix so I replaced it with a new monitor. Selling this for cheap! Price for the phone is $40. Text or email me. I'm in Peekskill. Cash only.

listings.title: 1979 Gibson "The SG" Wide Nut, Ebony Board T Top pickups, Exc Player
listings.body: Title pretty much describes the guitar. 1 11/16" wide nut, Great feeling neck, vintage T-top pickups.. vintage Gibson tone and feel on the cheap! Wiring harness is a new CTS harness. Neck is straight and true, Truss rod shows It's been turned very little in 47 years. Pictures show the seam separation in the body that's been professionally repaired. It must have separated along one of the body piece seams. Perfectly strong no worries. That's why I'm not asking $2,500... Comes in the Ibanez case shown. Would consider other trades for USA Gibson/Fender/Martin/Guild.
